note: Profiled app and fixed 3 performance bottlenecks: (1) Added cached_network_image for disk+memory image caching, replacing raw Image.network() calls in EventCard and EventDetailScreen; (2) Converted UpcomingScreen _UpcomingDaysList from pre-building all widgets to lazy ListView.builder with flat index model; (3) Combined HomeScreen double-filter pass into single-pass filtering; (4) Added RepaintBoundary to EventCard for scroll isolation. All 10 performance tests pass. Updated golden files. 0 new test failures.
